name: frontend-uiux-design-lab
description: Reusable frontend and UI/UX design plugin with broad skills for art direction, design systems, landing pages, dashboards, forms, commerce, copy, motion, accessibility, and polish.

interface.shortDescription: A public-ready frontend design plugin for stronger, more intentional interfaces.
interface.longDescription: Adds a reusable multi-skill frontend and UI/UX toolkit for websites, apps, dashboards, onboarding, commerce, accessibility, motion, and final polish. Includes practical scripts and starter assets for token audits, surface briefs, and broader product interface work.
defaultPrompt: Turn this generic frontend into a stronger, more intentional UI.
Build a design-system token plan for this product.
Polish this interface for hierarchy, trust, clarity, and conversion.
